title: Python Developer with expertise in AI/GenAI, RAG architectures, Data Integration, and Cloud Automation
company_focus:
Digital consulting and technology services for financial
services, telecommunications, and technology sectors
description:
Job Summary Synechron is seeking an experienced Python
Developer to join our dynamic team. The successful candidate
will play a critical role in designing, developing, and
maintaining data-driven solutions that support enterprise-
level analytics, AI initiatives, and platform
transformations. This role contributes to the organization’s
strategic objectives by delivering innovative data
solutions, enhancing operational efficiency, and supporting
data governance practices. The position offers an
opportunity to work on cutting-edge technologies and
collaborate across multidisciplinary teams to achieve
business excellence.

Software Requirements

- Required: Python (version 3.8+), Snowflake, SQL Server,
  Kubernetes, Git, Jenkins, and data modeling tools.
- Preferred: Java, React JS, orchestration tools (e.g., Apache
  Airflow), and AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow,
  PyTorch).
- Mandatory experience with data extraction, transformation,
  and analysis tools.
- Proven expertise in building AI-driven insights and RAG
  architectures, particularly Graph RAG.
- Familiarity with NLQ interfaces, Genesys Cloud APIs/SDKs,
  and Architect Flow.

Overall Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and optimize data pipelines for structured
  and semi-structured data flows.
- Build AI/GenAI solutions for deriving insights from
  enterprise data, including Natural Language Query
  interfaces.
- Integrate data ingestion processes with platforms such as
  Genesys Cloud and Salesforce, supporting external and
  internal APIs.
- Support large-scale platform transformations with effective
  project prioritization.
- Monitor, debug, and improve data pipelines for performance
  and reliability.
- Collaborate within Agile teams to ensure timely delivery of
  high-quality data solutions.
- Implement data governance, quality, and automation best
  practices.
- Maintain up-to-date documentation of technical solutions and
  processes.

Technical Skills (By Category)

- Programming Languages:Required: Python (expertise in
  software engineering principles)Preferred: Java, React JS

- Databases/Data Management:Snowflake, SQL Server, experience
  with data modeling, performance tuning, and handling semi-
  structured data

- Cloud Technologies:Cloud services for data ingestion and
  automation, such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud

- Frameworks and Libraries:Data Science tools, AI/ML
  frameworks, RAG architectures, NLQ interfaces

- Development Tools and Methodologies:Git, Jenkins, Agile
  (Scrum/Kanban), orchestration tools like Airflow

- Security Protocols:Knowledge of data security, access
  controls, and compliance standards

Experience Requirements

- 5–7 years of hands-on experience with Python, Snowflake, and
  SQL Server in data-focused roles.
- Proven experience designing and deploying AI-driven
  insights, with a strong understanding of RAG and Graph RAG
  architectures.
- Demonstrated expertise in data ingestion, pipelines, and API
  integrations with platforms like Genesys Cloud and
  Salesforce.
- Exposure to cloud automation, data governance, and platform
  transformation projects.
- Industry experience in finance, telecommunications, or
  technology sectors is preferred.
- Candidates with alternative experience in data science,
  advanced analytics, or similar fields are also eligible.

Day-to-Day Activities

- Developing and maintaining scalable data pipelines and data
  ingestion workflows.
- Collaborating with data scientists and business stakeholders
  to implement AI-driven solutions.
- Supporting platform migration and transformation initiatives
  through agile delivery.
- Monitoring pipeline performance and troubleshooting issues
  proactively.
- Participating in daily stand-ups, planning sessions, and
  code reviews.
- Documenting solutions, sharing best practices, and
  advocating for data governance standards.
- Providing technical guidance and mentorship to junior team
  members.

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science,
  Information Systems, or a related field.
- Certifications in Python programming, cloud platforms, or
  data management (preferred).
- Ongoing professional development through industry courses,
  webinars, or workshops related to data engineering, AI,
  and cloud technologies.
- Commitment to maintaining technical expertise and adapting
  to new tools and methodologies.

Professional Competencies

- Critical thinking and analytical problem-solving skills.
- Strong collaboration, stakeholder management, and
  negotiation capabilities.
- Excellent communication skills, with the ability to convey
  complex technical concepts clearly.
- Adaptability to evolving project requirements and technology
  landscapes.
- Innovative mindset with a focus on continuous improvement
  and automation.
- Effective time and priority management in a fast-paced
  environment.

SYNECHRON’S DIVERSITY & INCLUSION STATEMENT


Diversity & Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and
Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and
is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity,
and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is
committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting
equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to
all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps
build stronger, successful businesses as a global company.
We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds,
race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender,
sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower
our global workforce by offering flexible workplace
arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and
development programs, and more.

All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business
needs, job requirements and individual qualifications,
without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity,
sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Candidate Application Notice

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on building and deploying AI/GenAI
solutions, including RAG architectures, Graph RAG, and
Natural Language Query interfaces. The position requires
proven expertise in building AI-driven insights, not just
supporting infrastructure for AI work.
